title: Multimedia - Graphics
summary: 9618 — bitmap vs vector graphics, resolution, and colour depth.
learningObjectives: Calculate file size for bitmap images.
Select appropriate graphic type for use cases.

simpleExplanation.title: Pixels vs paths
simpleExplanation.summary: Bitmap images store pixel colour data; vector images store mathematical descriptions of shapes that scale cleanly.
steps: File size ∝ width × height × colour depth.

sections.content: **Multimedia graphics** (1.2.1) links **1.1 data representation** to **1.3 compression**. Practise **file size calculations**.
